creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
No, cli-only-mode needs QtDialog too (see https://redports.org/~uzsolt/20141007161912-23924-251193/fet-5.23.3.log ). Maybe can patch to solve this but now I haven't time.

Manual: it was my stupidity. Manual pages moved from 'doc' to new 'man' directory and I didn't notice it. Sorry. The updated patch uploaded.
